title: Daily Indexing Request Rules — Phase 21.6+
supersedes: All previous ad-hoc indexing request behavior
core_rule: Do not repeatedly request indexing for the same URL. Each indexing request consumes Google's attention budget. Repeated requests on unchanged pages signal spam.

page_is_high_value.description: Real calculators, real guides, real decisions, real blogs with unique content. NOT thin tools, NOT formula variants, NOT hash-ID scenarios.

changed_recently.description: Page content or internal links changed within last 14 days. Stale unchanged pages should not be re-requested — if Google didn't index it the first time, it won't the second.
changed_recently.minimum_change: At least one of: new content section, new internal links, improved meta, improved FAQ

eligible.description: Page is indexable: HTTP 200, self-canonical, robots index/follow, in sitemap, not noindexed, not redirected, not 404.
eligible.auto_disqualify: Any page with noindex, canonical-to-other, redirect, or 404 status

not_requested_in_last_7_days.description: Minimum 7-day cooldown between indexing requests for the same URL. This prevents spam pattern detection by Google.

not_already_indexed.description: Pages already showing Submitted and indexed in URL Inspection do not need re-requesting. Focus on unindexed pages.
not_already_indexed.exception: If indexed page has 0 impressions and content was significantly improved, may be eligible after 14-day content cooldown.

not_already_pending.description: Pages with active indexing request (REQUESTED or LIKELY_REQUESTED) should not be re-requested until monitoring window passes.
not_already_pending.exception: LIKELY_REQUESTED pages where Day 3 recheck confirms request was NOT registered — then ONE retry allowed.

daily_indexing_budget.reason: GSC UI Indexing Request is a manual workflow via CloakBrowser. Keep volume low to avoid triggering Google abuse detection.
priority_order: LIKELY_REQUESTED rechecks (if Day 3+ and confirmation missing)
Newly discovered high-value pages from internal link additions

phase19_daily_loop_integration.step: AFTER GSC freshness check and real-page focus gate
phase19_daily_loop_integration.note: Indexing requests are optional optimization. Daily SEO work continues even if no eligible URLs.
